'''ngalaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oophagy|oophagy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oophagy|oophagy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngalaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngælæyæth|ngælæyæth]] || [[word:ngælæyæj|ngælæyæj]] || [[word:ngælæyæsh|ngælæyæsh]] || [[word:ngælæyæ|ngælæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngalalayath|ngalalayath]] || [[word:ngalalayaj|ngalalayaj]] || [[word:ngalalayash|ngalalayash]] || [[word:ngalalaya|ngalalaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngalayath|ngalayath]] || [[word:ngalayaj|ngalayaj]] || [[word:ngalayash|ngalayash]] || [[word:ngalaya|ngalaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngalafyath|ngalafyath]] || [[word:ngalafyaj|ngalafyaj]] || [[word:ngalafyash|ngalafyash]] || [[word:ngalafyaf|ngalafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngalayatha|ngalayatha]] || [[word:ngalayaja|ngalayaja]] || [[word:ngalayasha|ngalayasha]] || [[word:ngalayaka|ngalayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngalayath|ngalayath]] || [[word:ngalayaj|ngalayaj]] || [[word:ngalayash|ngalayash]] || [[word:ngalaya|ngalaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngalayathal|ngalayathal]] || [[word:ngalayajal|ngalayajal]] || [[word:ngalayashal|ngalayashal]] || [[word:ngalayakal|ngalayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngalayathatha|ngalayathatha]] || [[word:ngalayajaja|ngalayajaja]] || [[word:ngalayashasha|ngalayashasha]] || [[word:ngalayaka|ngalayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngalayathan|ngalayathan]] || [[word:ngalayajan|ngalayajan]] || [[word:ngalayashan|ngalayashan]] || [[word:ngalayakan|ngalayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngalayathaoro|ngalayathaoro]] || [[word:ngalayajaoro|ngalayajaoro]] || [[word:ngalayashaoro|ngalayashaoro]] || [[word:ngalayakaoro|ngalayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
